description: Content that includes personal ratings, experiences, and recommendations about food/beverage establishments with specific details about ambiance, timing, and service quality.
structural_recipe: Establish venue name and location, share specific items tried (desserts, coffee, etc.), rate atmosphere and environment quality, provide practical timing advice (weekdays vs weekends for crowd levels), include professional food photography credit, use bullet separators for visual hierarchy, maintain conversational Arabic tone while delivering concrete recommendations.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences value authentic peer recommendations and practical logistics (crowd avoidance, best visiting times). Honest critiques with balanced perspectives (positive ambiance + honest crowd warnings) build trust. Location-specific details and professional photography credits signal credibility and quality curation.
transplantation_caveats: Requires genuine personal experience to avoid appearing inauthentic to Saudi audiences who value honesty
Timing recommendations must be culturally accurate (weekday vs weekend patterns vary by region and season)
Negative aspects must be framed constructively, not dismissively, to maintain cultural respect
cultural_constraints: Recommendations should acknowledge family-friendly aspects and gender-appropriate venue descriptions
